form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, was driven from back in the field when 9th (Sr4) over 1850m at Marburg beaten 60 m by Rosies Boy (2:16.80) in 3yo+ No NR on April 5 at $151. Before that 7th (Fr1) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 45 m by Miarka (2:01.80) in Up to 3 LTW on March 30 at $81. Needs to lift.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Worked forward to lead the event with two laps remaining.

form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished a narrow second behind Mysticalfantasy at this track over 2040m 4yo+ NR up to 40 last start. Before that was beaten 2.75 metres second again at this track over 1780m same class on April 2. Hard to beat again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced without cover and gave ground over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr2) over 1850m at Marburg beaten 22 m by Rosies Boy (2:16.80) in 3yo+ No NR on April 5 at $71. At the start before 9th (Sr1) over 1780m at this track, beaten 35 m by Bahamas Miss (2:13.70) in 3yo+ Up to 1 LTW on February 12 at $61. Can do much better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked near the 650m as a result of Im Here To Party breaking gait.

form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into fourth behind Rosies Boy at Marburg over 1850m in a 3yo+ No NR on April 5 at $9.50. Raced better the start before that with a good run despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr6) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 1.5 m by Miarka (2:01.80) in Up to 3 LTW on March 30 at $13. Can bounce back.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Had a tendency to over race while leading the event.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to her best. Last start 8th (10m Fr2) over 2200m at Marburg beaten 25 m by The Harris Hawk (2:47.70) in 4yo+ NR 40 to 70 on April 5 at $15. The start before 5th (FT Fr5) over 2200m at Marburg beaten 12 m by Getagrip (2:47.80) in 4yo+ NR 40 to 70 on March 23 at $81. A better run is on the cards.
